# selftune

> Agent skills fail silently. selftune makes them self-correcting. It observes
> real sessions, detects missed triggers, and evolves skill descriptions using
> actual usage data. Works with Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode — no extra
> API keys, uses your existing subscription. Zero runtime dependencies. MIT licensed.

Skill descriptions are written once based on what developers think users will
say, then never updated based on what users actually say. selftune closes this
feedback loop with a continuous evolution cycle: observe, detect, diagnose,
propose, validate, deploy, watch, repeat.

## Getting Started

- [README](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/README.md): Project overview, quick start, and setup instructions
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, architecture rules, and PR guidelines
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md): Version history and release notes

## Architecture

- [ARCHITECTURE](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/ARCHITECTURE.md): Domain map, module rules, and dependency structure
- [Golden Principles](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/docs/golden-principles.md): Core design principles and invariants
- [Evolution Pipeline](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/docs/design-docs/evolution-pipeline.md): How skill evolution works end-to-end
- [Monitoring Pipeline](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/docs/design-docs/monitoring-pipeline.md): Post-deploy regression detection design

## Skill Integration

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/SKILL.md): Agent-facing routing table for all selftune commands
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/AGENTS.md): Agent configuration and behavioral guidelines

## Workflows

- [Initialize](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Initialize.md): Agent environment detection and config bootstrap
- [Evals](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Evals.md): Generate eval sets from real usage logs
- [Grade](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Grade.md): 3-tier session grading (trigger, process, quality)
- [Evolve](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Evolve.md): Propose, validate, and deploy improved skill descriptions
- [Watch](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Watch.md): Post-deploy monitoring and auto-rollback
- [Rollback](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Rollback.md): Restore pre-evolution skill descriptions
- [Replay](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Replay.md): Backfill logs from existing Claude Code transcripts
- [Contribute](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Contribute.md): Export anonymized data for community signal pooling
- [Doctor](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Doctor.md): Health checks on logs, hooks, config, and schema
- [Ingest](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/Workflows/Ingest.md): Codex and OpenCode session ingestion

## References

- [Log Schema](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/references/logs.md): JSONL log file formats and record types
- [Grading Methodology](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/references/grading-methodology.md): How sessions are evaluated
- [Invocation Taxonomy](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/skill/references/invocation-taxonomy.md): Explicit, implicit, contextual, and negative trigger types

## Optional

- [PRD](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/PRD.md): Product requirements document
- [SECURITY](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting policy
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Contributor Covenant v2.1
- [Escalation Policy](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/docs/escalation-policy.md): How regressions are triaged
- [Design Docs Index](https://github.com/WellDunDun/selftune/blob/master/docs/design-docs/index.md): Index of all design documents
